assessor_1_raw: Inverse frequency weighting from training set is standard. Genuinely new categories in test set are a scope limitation, not a flaw. Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_2_raw: 200-case test set audit for label quality is appropriate for 200k-500k cases (small representative sample). Verdict: defense_wins.
assessor_3_raw: Temporal stability analysis across 3-month test bins provides drift detection. This is a strength of the design. Verdict: defense_wins.
